text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: The day has finally come to reclaim my honor.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've reflected upon the insufficiencies I displayed
during my last race and spent days and days
working hard since...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Please watch assured of my victory!
